items.description: Ordered list of TocItem entries ({id, label, anchor, level?}). Either a literal array or an @{binding} to a ViewModel field.

title.description: Optional heading label rendered above the list ('On this page' etc.). Usually a @string/... key resolved by rjui's text-key pass.

sticky.description: Whether the nav sticks to the viewport under sufficient height. Default: true.

stickyOffset.description: Pixel offset from viewport top when sticky. Default: 80.

activeAnchor.description: Optional externally-controlled active anchor id. When absent, the component self-computes via IntersectionObserver.

maxDepth.description: Maximum TocItem.level to render. Items with level > maxDepth are filtered. Default: 2.

onSelect.description: Optional event: (anchor: String) -> Void. Invoked before the default scroll.
